Here's a pattern worth recognizing: a business gets real website traffic over the weekend. Visitors type genuine questions. The site has no way to respond. By Monday, those people have moved on — usually to a competitor who did answer. This isn't a technology gap. It's an availability gap. And it compounds every single week the site stays silent after hours. An AI assistant built from your existing website content changes that equation without adding headcount.
